mapper.select: SELECT menu_oid, menu_nm, menu_page, menu_cd, menu_url, up_menu_oid, menu_lv, menu_seq, menu_type, menu_auth_lv, bbs_use_yn, prvc_use_yn, expsr_yn, use_yn, npag_yn, icon_nm, expsr_yn, menu_expln, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.menu WHERE menu_auth_lv = #{menuAuthLv} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY menu_lv, menu_seq

SELECT menu_oid, menu_nm, menu_page, menu_cd, menu_url, up_menu_oid, menu_lv, menu_seq, menu_type, menu_auth_lv, bbs_use_yn, prvc_use_yn, expsr_yn, npag_yn, use_yn, icon_nm, menu_expln, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.menu WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND menu_cd = #{menuCd}

SELECT menu_oid, menu_nm, menu_page, menu_cd, menu_url, up_menu_oid, menu_lv, menu_seq, menu_type, menu_auth_lv, bbs_use_yn, prvc_use_yn, expsr_yn, use_yn, npag_yn, icon_nm, menu_expln, reg_id, reg_dt, mdfcn_id, mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.menu WHERE use_yn = 'Y' AND menu_cd = #{menuCd}

SELECT m.menu_oid, m.menu_nm, m.menu_page, m.menu_cd, m.menu_url, m.up_menu_oid, m.menu_lv, m.menu_seq, m.menu_type, m.menu_auth_lv, m.bbs_use_yn, m.prvc_use_yn, m.expsr_yn, m.use_yn, m.npag_yn, m.icon_nm, m.menu_expln, m.reg_id, m.reg_dt, m.mdfcn_id, m.mdfcn_dt FROM ${schema}.menu m INNER JOIN ${schema}.bbs b ON m.bbs_oid = b.bbs_oid WHERE m.menu_cd = #{menuCd} AND m.use_yn = 'Y' AND m.bbs_use_yn = 'Y' AND b.bbs_oid = #{bbsOid} AND b.use_yn = 'Y'

/* selectRootMenuList */ SELECT menu_oid, menu_nm, menu_seq FROM ${schema}.menu WHERE menu_lv = 1 AND use_yn = 'Y' AND expsr_yn = 'Y' AND menu_auth_lv = 'COMMON' AND menu_type != 'HIDDEN' ORDER BY menu_seq ASC
